questions.question: и®ҫж ·жң?$X_1, X_2, \cdots, X_n$ е’?$Y_1, Y_2, \cdots, Y_n$ еҲҶеҲ«еҸ–иҮӘжӯЈжҖҒжҖ»дҪ“ $X \sim N\left(\mu_1, \sigma^2\right)$ е’?$Y \sim N\left(\mu_2, \sigma^2\right)$, дё”зӣёдә’зӢ¬з«?еҲҷз»ҹи®ЎйҮҸ $\frac{(n-1)\left(S_1^2+S_2^2\right)}{\sigma^2}$ жңҚд»Һ ( ).
questions.analysis: з”?$\frac{(n-1) S_1^2}{\sigma^2} \sim \chi^2(n-1), \frac{(n-1) S_2^2}{\sigma^2} \sim \chi^2(n-1)$, еҸ?$\chi^2$ еҲҶеёғзҡ„еҸҜеҠ жҖ? жң?$\frac{(n-1)\left(S_1^2+S_2^2\right)}{\sigma^2} \sim \chi^2(2(n-1))$.

questions.question: и®?$X_1, X_2, \cdots, X_{16}$ еҸ?$Y_1, Y_2, \cdots, Y_{25}$ еҲҶеҲ«жҳҜдёӨдёӘзӢ¬з«ӢжҖ»дҪ“ $N(0,16)$ е’?$N(1,9)$ зҡ„ж ·жң? д»?$\bar{X}$ е’?$\bar{Y}$ еҲҶеҲ«иЎЁзӨәдёӨдёӘж ·жң¬еқҮеҖ? еҲ?$P\{|\bar{X}-\bar{Y}|>1\}$ дё?()$.(\sqrt{34} \approx 5.830, \Phi(1.715)=0.9569)$
questions.analysis: $\begin{gathered}\bar{X} \sim N\left(0, \frac{16}{16}\right), \bar{Y} \sim N\left(1, \frac{9}{25}\right), \bar{X}-\bar{Y} \sim N\left(-1,1+\frac{9}{25}\right), \text { еҚ?} \bar{X}-\bar{Y} \sim N\left(-1, \frac{34}{25}\right) . \text { жүҖд»?} \\ P\{|\bar{X}-\bar{Y}|>1\}=1-P\{|\bar{X}-\bar{Y}| \leq 1\}=1-P\left\{0 \leq \frac{\bar{X}-\bar{Y}+1}{\sqrt{34} / 5} \leq \frac{2}{\sqrt{34} / 5}\right\} \\ \approx 1-\Phi(1.715)+\Phi(0)=1-0.9569+0.5=0.5431 .\end{gathered}$

questions.question: и®?$X_1, X_2, \cdots, X_8$ е’?$Y_1, Y_2, \cdots, Y_{10}$ еҲҶеҲ«жқҘиҮӘдёӨдёӘжӯЈжҖҒжҖ»дҪ“ $N(-1,4)$ е’?$N(2,25)$ зҡ„ж ·жң¬дё”зӣёдә’зӢ¬з«Ӣ, $S_1^2$ е’?$S_2^2$ еҲҶеҲ«дёәдёӨдёӘж ·жң¬зҡ„ж ·жң¬ж–№е·®, еҲҷжңҚд»?$F(7,9)$ зҡ„з»ҹи®ЎйҮҸжҳ?() .
questions.analysis: з”?$F$ еҲҶеёғзҡ„е®ҡд№?$F=\frac{S_1^2 / \sigma_1^2}{S_2^2 / \sigma_2^2}=\frac{\sigma_2^2 S_1^2}{\sigma_1^2 S_2^2}=\frac{25 S_1^2}{4 S_2^2} \sim F(7,9)$.

$\bar{X}-\bar{Y} \sim N\left(\mu_1-\mu_2, \frac{2 \sigma^2}{n}\right)$, ж ҮеҮҶеҢ–еҗҺ $\frac{(\bar{X}-\bar{Y})-\left(\mu_1-\mu_2\right)}{\sigma \sqrt{\frac{2}{n}}} \sim N(0,1)$, ж•?$\frac{\left[(\bar{X}-\bar{Y})-\left(\mu_1-\mu_2\right)\right]^2}{\frac{2 \sigma^2}{n}} \sim \chi^2(1)$.
еҸҲз”ұ $\frac{(n-1)\left(S_1^2+S_2^2\right)}{\sigma^2} \sim \chi^2(2 n-2), \bar{X}-\bar{Y}$ дё?$S_1^2+S_2^2$ зӣёдә’зӢ¬з«Ӣ, еҸ?$F$ еҲҶеёғзҡ„е®ҡд№үеҸҜзҹ?
$$
\frac{\frac{\left[(\bar{X}-\bar{Y})-\left(\mu_1-\mu_2\right)\right]^2}{\frac{2 \sigma^2}{n}} / 1}{\frac{(n-1)\left(S_1^2+S_2^2\right)}{\sigma^2} / 2(n-1)}=\frac{n\left[(\bar{X}-\bar{Y})-\left(\mu_1-\mu_2\right)\right]^2}{S_1^2+S_2^2} \sim F(1,2 n-2)
$$

questions.question: и®?$X_1, X_2, \cdots, X_8$ е’?$Y_1, Y_2, \cdots, Y_{10}$ еҲҶеҲ«жқҘиҮӘдёӨдёӘжӯЈжҖҒжҖ»дҪ“ $N(-1,4)$ е’?$N(2,25)$ зҡ„ж ·жң¬дё”зӣёдә’зӢ¬з«Ӣпј?$S_1^2$ е’?$S_2^2$ еҲҶеҲ«дёәдёӨдёӘж ·жң¬зҡ„ж ·жң¬ж–№е·®, еҲҷжңҚд»?$F(7,9)$ зҡ„з»ҹи®ЎйҮҸжҳ?( ).
questions.analysis: з”?$F$ еҲҶеёғзҡ„е®ҡд№?$F=\frac{S_1^2 / \sigma_1^2}{S_2^2 / \sigma_2^2}=\frac{\sigma_2^2 S_1^2}{\sigma_1^2 S_2^2}=\frac{25 S_1^2}{4 S_2^2} \sim F(7,9)$.
